description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9.11.1 Docker image and defines a pages job that runs in the default stage, caches the docs/node_modules/ directory, builds the documentation and publishes it to GitLab Pages. The pages job should only run on the master branch, execute the shell commands: mkdir public, cd docs, npm install, and npm run docs:build, then store the generated public/ folder as a pages artifact. Include the specified cache and artifact paths and restrict the job to the master branch.
